name: 4ct Christmas Mini Swag Pinecones and Green Bow - Wondershop™
description:
Add a woodland feel to your holiday decor with this Set of Four Mini Swag Pinecones and Green Bow from Wondershop™. Made from polyethylene faux cedar swag and pinecones and accented with green velvet bows, each is finished with a gold-toned hanging loop for easy decorating. Versatile and beautiful, you can hang them on the wall, doors or mantlepiece for that extra touch of festive joy.

Welcome to the Wondershop™.
